title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.267 - Criminal background check authorized, cost
text:
324.267.  Criminal background check authorized, cost. — 1.  Any applicant for a license to operate a massage business or a license to practice massage therapy shall authorize the board to conduct a criminal background check.
  2.  The cost of such background check shall be paid by the applicant.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1601, et al., A.L. 1999 H.B. 343 merged with S.B. 362)
